creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
PORT UPDATE, PREFIX FIX : textproc/p5-XML-Simple 1.05 -> 1.06

Please Note :
 1. I've CC'd the maintainer, andrew@ugh.net.au, on this PR.
 2. The PREFIX fix that I've included is rather brute force'ish, but
    it appears to be the only way to get perl modules to respect PREFIX
    correctly.  If you know of a better way to do this (I hope someone does)
    then please let me know.
